Apply Starting
Payments apply to the selected month first, then roll forward to future unpaid months. Any extra stays as rent credit.

Display Settings
Carry forward keeps your post-rent sales balance on your account instead of paying it out each month.

AI Assistant

Turn the assistant on or off for your account, and optionally give it a custom name.

This controls the assistant for your account on all devices.
